There's a series of texts here. One titl: There's a series of texts here. One title reads "The Archetype's Influence".
\"Today the Archetype was brought into t: "Today the Archetype was brought into the lab.
While it's still in its prototype stage,: While it's still in its prototype stage, we're confident that this will be enough to succeed.
Brave volunteers have stepped forward to: Brave volunteers have stepped forward to be put under its influence.
Many of the volunteers who interacted wi: Many of the volunteers who interacted with the Archetype soon fell to their demise, regrettably.
However, those who didn't showed interes: However, those who didn't showed interesting side effects.
The Archetype has a weird characteristic: The Archetype has a weird characteristic that can only be described as "possession".
While under its influence, subjects had: While under its influence, subjects had their physical appearance undergo certain changes.
Some of the subjects reported that their: Some of the subjects reported that their eyes, hair, and sometimes even skin turned to a certain shade of gold.
We've tested the removal of the Archetyp: We've tested the removal of the Archetype's influence as well. Results were overall positive, but inconsistent.
Some had their original physical appeara: Some had their original physical appearance restored, whereas some kept the alterations.
We don't know why the human body reacts: We don't know why the human body reacts this way, but it's something we're determined on figuring out."
There's a series of texts here. One titl: There's a series of texts here. One title reads "Legendary Bond".
\"Human immortality is something we've d: "Human immortality is something we've discussed and even attempted many times before.
Why do creatures known as \"Pokémon\" li: Why do creatures known as "Pokémon" live far longer lives than humans?
It seems, as previously theorized, that: It seems, as previously theorized, that Pokémon and humans share a common ancestor.
Using the Archetype's power, we were abl: Using the Archetype's power, we were able to unleash the hidden potential of certain subjects.
We are able to awaken a gene inside of a: We are able to awaken a gene inside of a human that brings forth their primitive instincts and form.
The result of this, subjects have turned: The result of this, subjects have turned into Pokémon themselves!
And not regular beings either. Beings th: And not regular beings either. Beings that have dominance over time, space, and anti-matter.
No further testing has been done at this: No further testing has been done at this time."
There's a series of texts here. One titl: There's a series of texts here. One title reads "The Core: Project Interceptor".
\"Long have humanity fought the ties of: "Long have humanity fought the ties of destiny itself.
Some don't even believe in its existence: Some don't even believe in its existence, but everything happens for a reason.
Is this the act of God? Perhaps the act: Is this the act of God? Perhaps the act of the universe itself?
The world is similar to that of programm: The world is similar to that of programming. It's commanded to follow a set of commands and instructions.
But what if we were able to intercept th: But what if we were able to intercept these commands? Rewrite what was already written?
What if someone not from this world woul: What if someone not from this world would appear?
What set of instructions would the syste: What set of instructions would the system give to deal with such a predicament?
Is it capable of dealing with such an ex: Is it capable of dealing with such an extraneous variable?
That's why we've created\"\\c[6] The Cor: That's why we've created"\c[6] The Core."
A series of pillars and conduits that re: A series of pillars and conduits that rest beneath the Earth's surface.
When The Core senses a presence outside: When The Core senses a presence outside this world's, the pillars will unearth themselves.
The rest of the text appears to be missi: The rest of the text appears to be missing...
There's a series of texts here. One titl: There's a series of texts here. One title reads "Interceptor's Limits".
\"Although the Interceptor acts as an ex: "Although the Interceptor acts as an exception to the Core's design, it is not omnipotent.
They can only travel through the univers: They can only travel through the universe where the Core exists.
If the Interceptor were to stray too far: If the Interceptor were to stray too far from the planet, they would lose consciousness.
Therefore they are not fit to undergo th: Therefore they are not fit to undergo the project based at Eclysia Pyramid.
If the Interceptor were to perish, the C: If the Interceptor were to perish, the Core would take damage.
In the event that the Core is too heavil: In the event that the Core is too heavily damaged, the Interceptor shall cease to exist.
Please note to any Interceptor subjects:: Please note to any Interceptor subjects: You do not live outside the realm of mortality.
\\c[6]Fail too many times, and that will: \c[6]Fail too many times, and that will be the end."
